How it works

From preference to parking spot in 4 steps

Your dedicated agent handles everything — from finding your car at auction/dealer to delivering it to your driveway.

1

Tell us what you want

Open the app and set your make, model, source country, condition, and budget. Takes less than 2 minutes.

2

Meet your agent

A dedicated import agent is assigned to your order. They search auctions and dealers on your behalf and keep you updated at every step.

3

Approve and pay

Your agent sends you vehicle options in chat with full cost breakdowns. You approve — they handle bidding, payment, and paperwork.

4

Car delivered to you

Shipping, port clearance, duty, and final delivery are all tracked in real time in the app. Your car arrives at your door.

▶
Watch how it works
2 min explainer video
Where we source from

Three continents. One app.

Choose your preferred source — or let your agent find the best deal across all three markets.

🇺🇸

US & Canada

Copart & IAAI auctions — the largest selection of used, clean title, and salvage vehicles in the world.

UsedSalvageClean title
🇦🇪

Dubai

Dealer-sourced vehicles — typically low mileage, well maintained, and competitively priced.

UsedLow mileage
🇨🇳

China

Brand new EVs and ICE vehicles direct from manufacturers — the future of African motoring.

Brand newEVsICE
Why AutoImport GH

Built for the African car buyer

Everything you need to import with confidence — from first search to final delivery.

🕵️

Dedicated agent

A real human agent is assigned to every order. They search, bid, negotiate, and communicate — you just approve.

💬

Real-time chat

Talk directly to your agent through the app. No WhatsApp groups, no lost messages, no chasing.

📍

Full journey tracking

Every stage — search, bid, win, ship, clear, deliver — tracked live in one timeline you can check anytime.

🔒

Transparent payments

No hidden fees. Your agent sends a full cost breakdown before you commit to anything. You are always in control.

📄

Documents in one place

Vehicle title, GRA declaration, duty receipt — everything stored safely and accessible in your order vault.

🚗

Any car, any source

From a Toyota Camry from a US auction to a brand new BYD from China — if it exists, we can import it.

🏢
📍 AutoImport GH team, Accra
500+
Cars imported
20+
Vetted agents
3+
Years experience
GH & NG
Markets served
About us

Our story

AutoImport GH was born out of a frustration shared by thousands of Ghanaians — the process of importing a car was opaque, stressful, and riddled with uncertainty. Payments disappeared. Timelines stretched. Documents got lost. Customers had no visibility into what was happening with their money or their vehicle.

We built AutoImport GH to fix that. By combining a dedicated agent model with a technology platform that gives customers real-time visibility at every stage, we have made importing a car as transparent and predictable as tracking a parcel. Today we serve customers across Ghana, with plans to expand across West Africa.

Our Mission

To make importing a vehicle to Africa as simple, transparent, and stress-free as ordering on your phone — with a trusted human agent by your side every step of the way.

Get the app

Start importing today

Available on iOS and Android. Set your preferences, meet your agent, and track your car — all from your phone.
